description_long: This fence is constructed from a series of vertically aligned, dark wooden planks, each with a pointed top, forming a uniform and secure barrier. The wood has a textured, weathered appearance, with visible grain patterns and subtle color variations that suggest outdoor exposure. The planks are closely spaced, leaving minimal gaps between them, enhancing privacy and security. The top edge of the fence is characterized by a consistent pointed design, giving it a slightly aggressive, protective look. There are no visible horizontal rails or decorative elements, and the structure appears solid and robust. The overall finish is matte, with a rough surface texture typical of untreated or minimally treated wood.
description: A dark, pointed wooden fence made of closely spaced vertical planks with a rough, weathered texture and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the fence with pointed tops and visible wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the pointed tops and close spacing of the planks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow edge and vertical alignment of the planks.
